Open RoweOS
Operating Intelligence

One platform to think, create, and operate
across your entire brand portfolio

RoweOS replaces fragmented workflows with a single intelligent layer that understands your brand as deeply as you do. Five AI agents, 150+ pre-built operations, autonomous scheduling, and full email and social publishing - all in a sovereign architecture where your data never leaves your control.

BrandAI

Five specialized agents - Strategy, Marketing, Operations, Documents, and Intelligence - that embody your brand identity. Manage content strategy, run deep research, maintain voice consistency, and operate across your entire portfolio from one interface.

Strategy Marketing Operations Documents Intelligence
LifeAI

Personal intelligence for every team member. Coaching, wellness, goal tracking, tax preparation, and daily optimization. One brand profile shared across the team - each person gets their own private LifeAI.

Coaching Wellness Goals Tax Copilot Planning
Platform Capabilities
Studio
150+ pre-built operations across strategy, marketing, content, research, and brand-specific workflows.
BloomNew
AI-generated content feed tailored to each brand. Swipeable ideas for social posts, images, video, and long-form - ready to edit, save, or publish instantly.
MailNew
Full email client with AI composition, branded templates, batch outreach pipelines, outbox management, and Gmail/Outlook integration - all native.
Social Publishing
Post to X, Instagram, and Threads. Schedule content, manage multiple brand accounts, and publish directly from one interface.
Automations
Scheduled workflows and multi-step pipelines that run autonomously on your cadence. AI content, email campaigns, social posts - hands-free.
Deep Research
Comprehensive multi-step analysis powered by the Intelligence agent for market research, competitive intelligence, and strategic insight.
Multi-Model AI
Claude, GPT, and Gemini. Choose the best model per task, switch anytime. No lock-in. Intelligence agent defaults to GPT for web-connected research.
Cross-Device Sync
Firebase-powered sync across desktop, tablet, and mobile. Your workspace travels with you.
Sovereign Architecture
Browser-native. API keys never leave your device. No vendor lock-in, no data harvesting. Your intelligence stays yours.
Why RoweOS
1
Brand-Embodied AI
Agents don't just know about your brand. They think, write, and operate as your brand.
2
Full Portfolio Control
Manage up to 15 brands from a single dashboard. Each with its own voice, strategy, and identity.
3
Creation to Publication
Strategy, content, images, video, email campaigns, social posting, and scheduling. One platform, end to end.
4
Zero Complexity
No installs, no build tools, no configuration. Open a browser, connect your API keys, and start.
Built For
Brand Strategists
Unified brand intelligence across your entire portfolio. Strategy, voice, and identity management that scales with you.
Small Business
Content creation, social publishing, email campaigns, and marketing automation. Enterprise-grade AI without the complexity.
Enterprise
Multi-brand management with shared profiles, private onboarding, and sovereign data architecture.
Limited Beta
Try Founder Free for One Month
Full access to BrandAI, LifeAI, Bloom, Mail, Studio, Automations, Social Publishing, and all 150+ operations. No credit card required. Early adopters lock in Founder pricing permanently.
